MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Robin Altman, Esq. appeared on behalf of the plaintiff. Also present: Sandra Randolph authorized agent. Defendant appeared in pro per. Case settled per stipulation - not reported. Trial date is vacated.
